title: Copy of Own Updates to Email

posts.author: dmytro (Dmytro Bukhantsov)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a feature request that I believe would be very useful for many users.

Is it possible to implement a function that allows users to receive copies of their own updates via email? This would be similar to the “notify me” function found in Jira preferences under “my changes.”

By having this feature, users will be able to keep track of their progress and activities easily. For example, it would help them remember what they were working on during the day, which would make filling out their time sheets more accurate. Additionally, consolidating all outgoing communication in an email would be convenient for users who prefer to keep everything in one place.

I hope you will consider adding this feature to the platform, as I believe it would be a valuable addition that many users would appreciate.
